recommendations.product_name: Celestron StarSense Explorer DX 130AZ Newtonian Reflector
pros: App-assisted StarSense alignment simplifies finding objects
Long focal length good for high magnification
Low chromatic aberration for sharp images
cons: Mount and eyepieces often sold separately
Heavier and less portable than small refractors
Higher price point for a complete kit
